name: ETH 4h Exhaustion Reacceptance Rotation v1
edge_mechanism: a directional stretch fails, value is reaccepted, and price rotates back toward medium balance inside a chop regime
thesis: Cycle 77 includes mean reversion from exhaustion only when structure reaccepts prior value. ETH 4h is still the cleanest pure-chop lane in the basket, so it is the most structurally honest home for this concept. The edge is not fading first impulse. It is entering only after value is reclaimed.
invalidation_condition: If ETH 4h reacceptance events still produce 0-1 trades or fail to carry back toward balance after costs, the mechanism fails.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price stretches away from value, cannot sustain that move, reclaims value, and rotates back toward medium balance.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Pure chop should generate more failed excursions than durable trends. Reacceptance after exhaustion is the clearest structural proof that the market is returning to balance.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is the best fit because it remains the clearest pure-chop lane and is better suited to value-based mean reversion than TAO.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: Real directional breaks may still be faded if the regime temporarily escapes chop.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If first targets work but overall expectancy stays thin, tighten the time exit before adding filters.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: Frequent modest balance rotations, many first-target captures, low reliance on giant runners.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: ETH 4h clears density and produces materially better participation than the prior 1-trade or 0-trade chop families.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, sub-15 trades, or repeated reacceptance entries that immediately re-break the stretched side.

density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: low relative to prior sparse continuation ideas

test_lanes.why_included: Best-fit pure-chop lane for exhaustion reacceptance rotation.
test_lanes.continue_if: ETH 4h shows enough reacceptance rotations with positive first-target expectancy.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: ETH 4h still undertrades or the moves remain too shallow after costs.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Moderate-to-high participation with many modest value rotations.

test_lanes.why_included: Checks whether the same reacceptance logic survives on the cycle primary asset with slightly more movement.
test_lanes.continue_if: SOL 4h preserves the same failed-excursion rotation with acceptable density.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: SOL 4h transition pressure breaks the mean-reversion thesis.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Fewer but larger reacceptance rotations than ETH.

test_lanes.why_included: Tests whether the same mechanism gains density without falling back into intraday noise.
test_lanes.continue_if: SOL 1h increases count while preserving value-reacceptance structure.

long: Exit remaining 20% on touch of EMA_55 or 4 bars
short: Exit remaining 20% on touch of EMA_55 or 4 bars
